candidates.selection_reason: Speed-first candidate. AfrekaOS needs fast, practical, checklist-style responses for everyday SME operators. Small footprint suits the 8 GB RAM target.
Stronger reasoning candidate to fall back on if the 1.7B model is too shallow on SME operations prompts.
Conservative control baseline only. Not the default; used to sanity-check Qwen candidates, not to replace them by default.

scoring_notes.speed_emphasis: Speed and responsiveness matter more for AfrekaOS daily SME operations than they did for prior challenge shapes.
scoring_notes.quality_floor: Practical answer quality still matters; a fast but reckless model is not acceptable.
scoring_notes.winner_criteria: Winner must balance RAM, TPS, first-token latency, and SME answer quality.

prohibited_use: no cloud inference during judged runtime
